description: Create a GitHub Actions workflow named Test that runs on pull requests, pushes to trunk-* branches, and workflow dispatches. The workflow starts action runners, then uses a matrix to run build and test jobs with various configurations on self-hosted or ubuntu-latest runners. It also includes a release job that runs build and test jobs with specific configurations when the 'release' label is present. Finally, it runs a tests_complete job that checks the results of the previous jobs.
